title: 2021 CSH (CM300) Moose Permit Reporting
summary: Please report 2021 CSH (CM300) Moose Permit by October 5, 2021 online at www.adfg.alaska.gov , or mail CSH Moose Permit to Alaska Dept. of Fish & Game (ADFG) or report in person during regular business hours – 8:00 a.m. – 5:00 p.m.

title: AOOS Awarded $4,176,512 for Ocean Observing
summary: NOAA’s U.S. Integrated Ocean Observing System (IOOS®) Office announced 11 new five-year cooperative agreements that support the continued growth, expansion, and modernization of our nation’s climate, coastal, ocean, and Great Lakes observing capabilities. title: Individual Disaster Relief Program Applications Now Available
summary: The online application for the NANA Individual Disaster Relief Program is now available at caresact.nana.com/ . Paper applications are on their way via regular U.S. mail.
